SubOption.Name: Surging Grit

Option.Desc: During the "Surging Grit" period, the ally targets' DoT dealt ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's All-Type RES. When the enemy target receives DoT, increases all allies DoT dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Up to a max of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s). Lasts until "Surging Grit" ends.
Option.Name: Exposition

Option.Desc: During "Surging Grit," each stack of "Echo Enigma" increases Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> when ally targets deal damage.
Option.Name: Torn Fabric

Option.Desc: Every stack of "Echo Enigma" increases enemy target's DMG received by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. During "Surging Grit," enemy targets gain <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of "Echo Enigma" after a memosprite attacks them.
Option.Name: Cinnabar Inscription

SubOption.Desc: Every time a DoT is received by an enemy target, additionally accumulates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Grit Value for allies.
SubOption.Name: Triggers DoT

SubOption.Desc: When an enemy target enters battle, they are inflicted with <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of "Echo Enigma," which deals a special kind of <color=#f29e38ff>Wind Shear</color>, and they suffer <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of "Echo Enigma" after acting, receiving Wind DoT at the start of each turn. Goes up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) at max for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
SubOption.Name: Concordant Truce

SubOption.Desc: Entering the "Surging Grit" state causes all enemies to suffer <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of the special <color=#f29e38ff>Wind Shear</color> "Echo Enigma," and causes all currently suffered DoT to immediately produce DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG. During the "Surging Grit" period, increases enemy targets' DMG received by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, reduces DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>, and increases SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>.
SubOption.Name: Surging Grit

Option.Desc: During "Surging Grit," after an ally uses a Skill to attack enemy targets, they deal additional True DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original damage to each enemy target hit.
Option.Name: Solo Symphony

Option.Desc: Upon entering "Surging Grit," Breaks all enemy targets' Weakness and recovers <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Skill Point(s). During "Surging Grit," Break DMG dealt to enemy targets increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Option.Name: Ravings

Option.Desc: During "Surging Grit," memosprite's DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and when memosprite disappears, memomaster's action advances by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Option.Name: Ballad

SubOption.Desc: After allies use Skill to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Grit Value for allies.
SubOption.Name: Skill Attack

SubOption.Desc: At the start of battle, after an ally uses their Skill to attack an enemy target, deals a set amount of DMG to all attacked enemy targets.
SubOption.Name: Concordant Truce

SubOption.Desc: Upon entering Surging Grit, advances all allies actions by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases DMG received by enemy targets during this period by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Additionally, after an ally uses their Skill to attack an enemy target, deals an additional set amount of DMG to all attacked enemy targets and adjacent targets.
SubOption.Name: Surging Grit

Option.Desc: During "Surging Grit," after an ally uses a Skill to attack enemy targets, they deal additional True DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original damage to each enemy target hit.
Option.Name: Solo Symphony

Option.Desc: Upon entering "Surging Grit," Breaks all enemy targets' Weakness and recovers <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Skill Point(s). During "Surging Grit," Break DMG dealt to enemy targets increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Option.Name: Ravings

Option.Desc: During "Surging Grit," memosprite's DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and when memosprite disappears, memomaster's action advances by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Option.Name: Ballad

SubOption.Desc: After allies use Skill to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Grit Value for allies.
SubOption.Name: Skill Attack

SubOption.Desc: At the start of battle, after an ally uses their Skill to attack an enemy target, deals a set amount of DMG to all attacked enemy targets.
SubOption.Name: Concordant Truce

SubOption.Desc: Upon entering Surging Grit, advances all allies actions by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases DMG received by enemy targets during this period by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Additionally, after an ally uses their Skill to attack an enemy target, deals an additional set amount of DMG to all attacked enemy targets and adjacent targets.
SubOption.Name: Surging Grit
